Name: Chunked Write
Description: Writes one chunk of a large file at a given byte offset. Intended for multi-chunk transfers (e.g. multi-GB model pushes across the beacon mesh). Chunks are written to a .part sidecar file; the final chunk triggers fsync, optional sha256 verification, and atomic rename to the target path.

EventOutputs.Name: ChunkWritten
EventOutputs.Description: Fires after a non-final chunk is written

EventOutputs.Name: WriteComplete
EventOutputs.Description: Fires after the final chunk is written, fsynced, verified, and the .part file has been renamed to the target path

EventOutputs.Name: Sha256Mismatch
EventOutputs.Description: Fires when IsFinal=true and the computed sha256 of the completed .part file does not match the Sha256 input

SettingsInputs.Name: FilePath
SettingsInputs.Description: Final path the completed file will live at. Chunks are written to <FilePath>.part until the final chunk renames it.

SettingsInputs.Name: Content
SettingsInputs.Description: This chunk's bytes. If ContentEncoding="base64", interpreted as base64 (for binary transport over JSON). Otherwise written as-is per Encoding.

SettingsInputs.Name: ContentEncoding
SettingsInputs.Description: How to interpret Content on the wire. "base64" (default) is safe for binary; "utf8" for text.

SettingsInputs.Name: Offset
SettingsInputs.Description: Byte offset where this chunk begins in the final file. Zero for the first chunk; subsequent chunks advance by the decoded byte length of the prior chunk's content.

SettingsInputs.Name: ChunkIndex
SettingsInputs.Description: Zero-based index of this chunk in the sequence (informational; used in logs)

SettingsInputs.Name: TotalChunks
SettingsInputs.Description: Total chunk count the sender expects to send (informational; used in logs)

SettingsInputs.Name: IsFinal
SettingsInputs.Description: True for the last chunk in the sequence. Triggers fsync, optional sha256 verify, and atomic rename <FilePath>.part -> <FilePath>.

SettingsInputs.Name: Sha256
SettingsInputs.Description: Hex-encoded sha256 of the complete final file. When set and IsFinal=true, the task verifies before renaming; mismatch fires Sha256Mismatch and deletes the .part file.

SettingsInputs.Name: CreateDirectory
SettingsInputs.Description: If true (default), the target directory is created recursively when missing.

StateOutputs.Name: FilePath
StateOutputs.Description: The fully resolved absolute final path

StateOutputs.Name: PartialFilePath
StateOutputs.Description: The <FilePath>.part file in progress (or the finalized file after IsFinal)

StateOutputs.Name: TotalBytesOnDisk
StateOutputs.Description: Current size of the .part file (or the final file if complete)

StateOutputs.Name: IsComplete
StateOutputs.Description: True only after the final chunk successfully renamed the .part file to FilePath

StateOutputs.Name: Sha256Verified
StateOutputs.Description: True if IsFinal=true, Sha256 was provided, and verification passed

StateOutputs.Name: ChunkIndex
StateOutputs.Description: Echo of input ChunkIndex, for convenience in downstream wiring
